ast.name: description
ast.source: Finds all solutions of the linear system U * x = b where U is an [n x n] upper triangular matrix and b is a [n] column vector.
ast.target: 求解线性系统 U * x = b 的所有解，其中 U 是一个 [n x n] 上三角矩阵，b 是一个 [n] 列向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the cubic root value. If x = y * y * y, then y is the cubic root of x. When `x` is a number or complex number, an optional second argument `allRoots` can be provided to return all three cubic roots. If not provided, the principal root is returned
ast.target: 计算立方根值。如果 x = y * y * y，则 y 是 x 的立方根。当 `x` 是数字或复数时，可以提供一个可选的第二个参数 `allRoots` 来返回所有三个立方根。如果未提供，则返回主根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards plus infinity. If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards plus infinity.
ast.target: 将值向正无穷方向舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向正无穷方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the cube of a value. The cube of x is x * x * x.
ast.target: 计算一个值的立方。x 的立方是 x * x * x。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the power of x to y element wise.
ast.target: 逐元素计算 x 的 y 次幂。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the exponent of a value.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the matrix exponential, expm(A) = e^A. The matrix must be square. Not to be confused with exp(a), which performs element-wise exponentiation.
ast.target: 计算矩阵指数，expm(A) = e^A。矩阵必须是方阵。不要与 exp(a) 混淆，后者执行逐元素指数运算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the value of subtracting 1 from the exponential value.
ast.target: 计算指数值减去 1 的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards zero. If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards zero.
ast.target: 将值向零方向舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向零方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards minus infinity.If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards minus infinity.
ast.target: 将值向负无穷方向舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向负无穷方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the hypotenuse of a list with values.
ast.target: 计算一个值列表的斜边长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the (modular) multiplicative inverse of a modulo b. Solution to the equation ax ≣ 1 (mod b)
ast.target: 计算 a 模 b 的（模）乘法逆元。方程 ax ≣ 1 (mod b) 的解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the logarithm of a value. If no base is provided, the natural logarithm of x is calculated. If base if provided, the logarithm is calculated for the specified base. log(x, base) is defined as log(x) / log(base).
ast.target: 计算一个值的对数。如果未提供底数，则计算 x 的自然对数。如果提供了底数，则计算指定底数的对数。log(x, base) 定义为 log(x) / log(base)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the 10-base logarithm of a value.
ast.target: 计算一个值的以 10 为底的对数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the 2-base of a value. This is the same as calculating `log(x, 2)`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的以 2 为底的对数。这与计算 `log(x, 2)` 相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the modulus, the remainder of an integer division.
ast.target: 计算模数，即整数除法的余数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the norm of a number, vector or matrix.
ast.target: 计算数字、向量或矩阵的范数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the nth root of a value. The principal nth root of a positive real number A, is the positive real solution of the equation "x^root = A".
ast.target: 计算一个值的 n 次方根。正实数 A 的主 n 次方根是方程 \"x^root = A\" 的正实数解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the nth roots of a value. An nth root of a positive real number A, is a positive real solution of the equation "x^root = A". This function returns an array of complex values.
ast.target: 计算一个值的所有 n 次方根。正实数 A 的 n 次方根是方程 \"x^root = A\" 的正实数解。此函数返回一个复数值数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the power of x to y, x^y.
ast.target: 计算 x 的 y 次幂，x^y。

ast.name: description
ast.source: round a value towards the nearest integer.If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards the nearest integer. When n is specified, the value is rounded to n decimals.
ast.target: 将值向最近的整数舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向最近的整数舍入。当指定 n 时，值将四舍五入到 n 位小数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the sign of a value. The sign of a value x is 1 when x>0, -1 when x<0, and 0 when x=0.
ast.target: 计算一个值的符号。值 x 的符号在 x>0 时为 1，在 x<0 时为 -1，在 x=0 时为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the square root value. If x = y * y, then y is the square root of x.
ast.target: 计算平方根值。如果 x = y * y，则 y 是 x 的平方根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the principal square root of a square matrix. The principal square root matrix `X` of another matrix `A` is such that `X * X = A`.
ast.target: 计算方阵的主平方根。矩阵 `A` 的主平方根矩阵 `X` 满足 `X * X = A`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Solves the real-valued Sylvester equation AX+XB=C for X
ast.target: 求解实值 Sylvester 方程 AX+XB=C 中的 X。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performs a real Schur decomposition of the real matrix A = UTU'
ast.target: 对实矩阵 A = UTU' 执行实 Schur 分解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Solves the Continuous-time Lyapunov equation AP+PA'+Q=0 for P
ast.target: 求解连续时间 Lyapunov 方程 AP+PA'+Q=0 中的 P。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the square of a value. The square of x is x * x.
ast.target: 计算一个值的平方。x 的平方是 x * x。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inverse the sign of a value. Converts booleans and strings to numbers.
ast.target: 反转一个值的符号。将布尔值和字符串转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Converts booleans and strings to numbers.
ast.target: 将布尔值和字符串转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the extended greatest common divisor for two values. The result is an array [d, x, y] with 3 entries, where d is the greatest common divisor, and d = x * a + y * b.
ast.target: 计算两个值的扩展最大公约数。结果是一个包含3个元素的数组 [d, x, y]，其中 d 是最大公约数，且 d = x * a + y * b。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise AND operation. Performs the logical AND operation on each pair of the corresponding bits of the two given values by multiplying them. If both bits in the compared position are 1, the bit in the resulting binary representation is 1, otherwise, the result is 0
ast.target: 按位与运算。通过对两个给定值的每一对对应位进行乘法运算来执行逻辑与操作。如果比较位置的两个位都是1，则结果二进制表示中的位为1，否则结果为0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise NOT operation. Performs a logical negation on each bit of the given value. Bits that are 0 become 1, and those that are 1 become 0.
ast.target: 按位非运算。对给定值的每一位执行逻辑取反。为0的位变为1，为1的位变为0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise OR operation. Performs the logical inclusive OR operation on each pair of corresponding bits of the two given values. The result in each position is 1 if the first bit is 1 or the second bit is 1 or both bits are 1, otherwise, the result is 0.
ast.target: 按位或运算。对两个给定值的每一对对应位执行逻辑或操作。如果第一位是1或第二位是1或两者都是1，则每个位置的结果为1，否则结果为0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise XOR operation, exclusive OR. Performs the logical exclusive OR operation on each pair of corresponding bits of the two given values. The result in each position is 1 if only the first bit is 1 or only the second bit is 1, but will be 0 if both are 0 or both are 1.
ast.target: 按位异或运算，即排他或。对两个给定值的每一对对应位执行逻辑异或操作。如果只有第一位是1或只有第二位是1，则每个位置的结果为1，但如果两者都是0或两者都是1，则结果为0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise left logical shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位左逻辑移位 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise right arithmetic shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位右算术移位 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise right logical shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位右逻辑移位 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Bell Numbers count the number of partitions of a set. A partition is a pairwise disjoint subset of S whose union is S. `bellNumbers` only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: n >= 0.
ast.target: 贝尔数计算集合的划分数量。划分是 S 的成对不相交子集，其并集为 S。`bellNumbers` 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：n >= 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Catalan Numbers enumerate combinatorial structures of many different types. catalan only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: n >= 0.
ast.target: 卡特兰数枚举多种不同类型的组合结构。catalan 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：n >= 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The composition counts of n into k parts. composition only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: k <= n.
ast.target: 将 n 划分为 k 个部分的组合计数。composition 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：k <= n。

ast.name: description
ast.source: he Stirling numbers of the second kind, counts the number of ways to partition a set of n labelled objects into k nonempty unlabelled subsets. `stirlingS2` only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: k <= n. If n = k or k = 1, then s(n,k) = 1.
ast.target: 第二类斯特林数，计算将 n 个有标签对象划分为 k 个非空无标签子集的方法数。`stirlingS2` 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：k <= n。如果 n = k 或 k = 1，则 s(n,k) = 1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the argument of a complex value. If x = a+bi, the argument is computed as atan2(b, a).
ast.target: 计算复数值的辐角。如果 x = a+bi，则辐角计算为 atan2(b, a)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the complex conjugate of a complex value. If x = a+bi, the complex conjugate is a-bi.
ast.target: 计算复数值的复共轭。如果 x = a+bi，则复共轭为 a-bi。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the imaginary part of a complex number.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the real part of a complex number.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Evaluate an expression or an array with expressions.
ast.target: 计算表达式或包含表达式的数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display documentation on a function or data type.
ast.target: 显示函数或数据类型的文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the Euclidean distance between two points.
ast.target: 计算两点之间的欧几里得距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Computes the intersection point of lines and/or planes.
ast.target: 计算直线和/或平面的交点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical and. Test whether two values are both defined with a nonzero/nonempty value.
ast.target: 逻辑与。测试两个值是否都定义为非零/非空值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical not. Flips the boolean value of given argument.
ast.target: 逻辑非。翻转给定参数的布尔值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical or. Test if at least one value is defined with a nonzero/nonempty value.
ast.target: 逻辑或。测试是否至少有一个值定义为非零/非空值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical exclusive or, xor. Test whether one and only one value is defined with a nonzero/nonempty value.
ast.target: 逻辑异或，xor。测试是否只有一个值定义为非零/非空值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate a matrix one dimension less than A by applying callback to each slice of A along dimension dim.
ast.target: 通过对矩阵 A 沿维度 dim 的每个切片应用回调函数，生成一个比 A 少一维的矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return a column from a matrix or array.
ast.target: 从矩阵或数组中返回一列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Concatenate matrices. By default, the matrices are concatenated by the last dimension. The dimension on which to concatenate can be provided as last argument.
ast.target: 连接矩阵。默认情况下，矩阵按最后一个维度连接。可以提供最后一个参数来指定连接的维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count the number of elements of a matrix, array or string.
ast.target: 计算矩阵、数组或字符串的元素数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the cross product for two vectors in three dimensional space.
ast.target: 计算三维空间中两个向量的叉积。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Complex Conjugate and Transpose a matrix
ast.target: 对矩阵进行复共轭和转置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the determinant of a matrix

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the dot product of two vectors. The dot product of A = [a1, a2, a3, ..., an] and B = [b1, b2, b3, ..., bn] is defined as dot(A, B) = a1 * b1 + a2 * b2 + a3 * b3 + ... + an * bn
ast.target: 计算两个向量的点积。A = [a1, a2, a3, ..., an] 和 B = [b1, b2, b3, ..., bn] 的点积定义为 dot(A, B) = a1 * b1 + a2 * b2 + a3 * b3 + ... + an * bn。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the eigenvalues and optionally eigenvectors of a square matrix
ast.target: 计算方阵的特征值，并可选地计算特征向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flatten a multi dimensional matrix into a single dimensional matrix.
ast.target: 将多维矩阵展平为一维矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Iterates over all elements of a matrix/array, and executes the given callback function.
ast.target: 遍历矩阵/数组的所有元素，并执行给定的回调函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find the data type of all elements in a matrix or array, for example "number" if all items are a number and "Complex" if all values are complex numbers. If a matrix contains more than one data type, it will return "mixed".
ast.target: 查找矩阵或数组中所有元素的数据类型，例如，如果所有项都是数字，则返回 \"number\"，如果所有值都是复数，则返回 \"Complex\"。如果矩阵包含多种数据类型，则返回 \"mixed\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the identity matrix with size m-by-n. The matrix has ones on the diagonal and zeros elsewhere.
ast.target: 返回大小为 m×n 的单位矩阵。该矩阵在对角线上为1，其他位置为0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the inverse of a matrix

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Moore–Penrose inverse of a matrix
ast.target: 计算矩阵的摩尔-彭若斯逆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the Kronecker product of 2 matrices or vectors.
ast.target: 计算2个矩阵或向量的克罗内克积。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new matrix or array with the results of the callback function executed on each entry of the matrix/array or the matrices/arrays.
ast.target: 创建一个新矩阵或数组，其结果是对矩阵/数组或多个矩阵/数组的每个条目执行回调函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a dense matrix from vectors as individual columns.
ast.target: 从向量作为单独的列创建一个稠密矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a matrix by evaluating a generating function at each index.
ast.target: 通过在每个索引处计算生成函数来创建矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a dense matrix from vectors as individual rows.
ast.target: 从向量作为单独的行创建一个稠密矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Partition-based selection of an array or 1D matrix. Will find the kth smallest value, and mutates the input array. Uses Quickselect.
ast.target: 对数组或一维矩阵进行基于分区的选择。将找到第k个最小值，并会修改输入数组。使用快速选择算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a range. Lower bound of the range is included, upper bound is excluded.
ast.target: 创建一个范围。范围的下界包含，上界不包含。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reshape a multi dimensional array to fit the specified dimensions.
ast.target: 将多维数组重塑为指定的维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns a 2-D rotation matrix (2x2) for a given angle (in radians). Returns a 2-D rotation matrix (3x3) of a given angle (in radians) around given axis.
ast.target: 返回给定角度（弧度）的二维旋转矩阵（2x2）。返回给定角度（弧度）绕给定轴的二维旋转矩阵（3x3）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return a row from a matrix or array.
ast.target: 从矩阵或数组中返回一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the size of a matrix.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort the items in a matrix. Compare can be a string "asc", "desc", "natural", or a custom sort function.
ast.target: 对矩阵中的元素进行排序。比较器可以是字符串 \"asc\"、\"desc\"、\"natural\"，或自定义排序函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Remove inner and outer singleton dimensions from a matrix.
ast.target: 移除矩阵的内部和外部单例维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the trace of a matrix: the sum of the elements on the main diagonal of a square matrix.
ast.target: 计算矩阵的迹：方阵主对角线上元素的总和。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 创建一个包含零的矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 计算 N 维傅里叶变换。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 计算 N 维逆傅里叶变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the number of combinations of n items taken k at a time
ast.target: 计算从 n 个物品中一次取 k 个的组合数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the number of combinations of n items taken k at a time with replacements.
ast.target: 计算从 n 个物品中一次取 k 个的可重复组合数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the factorial of a value

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the gamma function. For small values, the Lanczos approximation is used, and for large values the extended Stirling approximation.
ast.target: 计算伽玛函数。对于小值，使用 Lanczos 近似；对于大值，使用扩展 Stirling 近似。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logarithm of the gamma function for real, positive numbers and complex numbers, using Lanczos approximation for numbers and Stirling series for complex numbers.
ast.target: 计算实数正数和复数的伽玛函数对数，对数字使用 Lanczos 近似，对复数使用 Stirling 级数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence  between two distributions.
ast.target: 计算两个分布之间的 Kullback-Leibler (KL) 散度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multinomial Coefficients compute the number of ways of picking a1, a2, ..., ai unordered outcomes from `n` possibilities. multinomial takes one array of integers as an argument. The following condition must be enforced: every ai > 0.
ast.target: 多项式系数计算从 `n` 种可能性中选取 a1, a2, ..., ai 个无序结果的方式数。multinomial 接受一个整数数组作为参数。必须满足以下条件：每个 ai > 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the number of permutations of n items taken k at a time
ast.target: 计算从 n 个物品中一次取 k 个的排列数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pick a random entry from a given array.
ast.target: 从给定数组中随机选取一个条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compare two values. Returns 1 when x > y, -1 when x < y, and 0 when x == y.
ast.target: 比较两个值。当 x > y 时返回 1，当 x < y 时返回 -1，当 x == y 时返回 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compare two values of any type in a deterministic, natural way. Returns 1 when x > y, -1 when x < y, and 0 when x == y.
ast.target: 以确定、自然的方式比较任意类型的两个值。当 x > y 时返回 1，当 x < y 时返回 -1，当 x == y 时返回 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compare two strings lexically. Comparison is case sensitive. Returns 1 when x > y, -1 when x < y, and 0 when x == y.
ast.target: 按字典顺序比较两个字符串。比较区分大小写。当 x > y 时返回 1，当 x < y 时返回 -1，当 x == y 时返回 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check equality of two matrices element wise. Returns true if the size of both matrices is equal and when and each of the elements are equal.
ast.target: 逐元素检查两个矩阵是否相等。如果两个矩阵的大小相等且每个元素都相等，则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check equality of two values. Returns true if the values are equal, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查两个值是否相等。如果值相等则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check equality of two strings. Comparison is case sensitive. Returns true if the values are equal, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查两个字符串是否相等。比较区分大小写。如果值相等则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is larger than y. Returns true if x is larger than y, and false if not. Comparing a value with NaN returns false.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否大于 y。如果 x 大于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。将一个值与 NaN 比较返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is larger or equal to y. Returns true if x is larger or equal to y, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否大于或等于 y。如果 x 大于或等于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is smaller than value y. Returns true if x is smaller than y, and false if not. Comparing a value with NaN returns false.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否小于值 y。如果 x 小于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。将一个值与 NaN 比较返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is smaller or equal to value y. Returns true if x is smaller than y, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否小于或等于值 y。如果 x 小于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check unequality of two values. Returns true if the values are unequal, and false if they are equal.
ast.target: 检查两个值是否不相等。如果值不相等则返回 true，如果相等则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the cartesian product of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays and the values will be sorted in ascending order before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的笛卡尔积。多维数组将被转换为一维数组，并且值将在操作前按升序排序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the difference of two (multi)sets: every element of set1, that is not the element of set2. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的差集：set1 中所有不属于 set2 的元素。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Collect the distinct elements of a multiset. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 收集多重集合中的不同元素。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the intersection of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的交集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether a (multi)set is a subset of another (multi)set: every element of set1 is the element of set2. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 检查一个（多重）集合是否是另一个（多重）集合的子集：set1 的每个元素都是 set2 的元素。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count the multiplicity of an element in a multiset. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 计算一个元素在多重集合中的重数。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the powerset of a (multi)set: the powerset contains very possible subsets of a (multi)set. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 创建一个（多重）集合的幂集：幂集包含（多重）集合所有可能的子集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count the number of elements of a (multi)set. When the second parameter "unique" is true, count only the unique values. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 计算一个（多重）集合的元素数量。当第二个参数 \"unique\" 为 true 时，只计算唯一值。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the symmetric difference of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的对称差集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the union of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的并集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the transfer function of a zero-pole-gain model.
ast.target: 计算零极点增益模型的传递函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the frequency response of a filter given its numerator and denominator coefficients.
ast.target: 根据给定的分子和分母系数计算滤波器的频率响应。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the erf function of a value using a rational Chebyshev approximations for different intervals of x
ast.target: 使用有理切比雪夫近似计算值的 erf 函数，针对 x 的不同区间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the Riemann Zeta Function using an infinite series and Riemann's Functional Equation for the entire complex plane
ast.target: 使用无穷级数和黎曼函数方程计算整个复平面上的黎曼 Zeta 函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the median absolute deviation of a matrix or a list with values. The median absolute deviation is defined as the median of the absolute deviations from the median.
ast.target: 计算矩阵或值列表的中位数绝对偏差。中位数绝对偏差定义为与中位数的绝对偏差的中位数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the maximum value of a list of values. If any NaN values are found, the function yields the last NaN in the input.
ast.target: 计算值列表的最大值。如果发现任何 NaN 值，函数将返回输入中的最后一个 NaN。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the arithmetic mean of a list of values.
ast.target: 计算值列表的算术平均值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the median of all values. The values are sorted and the middle value is returned. In case of an even number of values, the average of the two middle values is returned.
ast.target: 计算所有值的中位数。对值进行排序并返回中间值。如果值的数量为偶数，则返回两个中间值的平均值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the minimum value of a list of values. If any NaN values are found, the function yields the last NaN in the input.
ast.target: 计算一组值的最小值。如果发现任何 NaN 值，函数将返回输入中的最后一个 NaN。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Computes the mode of all values as an array. In case mode being more than one, multiple values are returned in an array.
ast.target: 计算所有值的众数，以数组形式返回。如果众数不止一个，则返回包含多个值的数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the product of all values.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the standard deviation of all values, defined as std(A) = sqrt(variance(A)). Optional parameter normalization can be "unbiased" (default), "uncorrected", or "biased".
ast.target: 计算所有值的标准差，定义为 std(A) = sqrt(variance(A))。可选参数 normalization 可以是 \"unbiased\"（默认）、\"uncorrected\" 或 \"biased\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the cumulative sum of all values.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the sum of all values.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the variance of all values. Optional parameter normalization can be "unbiased" (default), "uncorrected", or "biased".
ast.target: 计算所有值的方差。可选参数 normalization 可以是 \"unbiased\"（默认）、\"uncorrected\" 或 \"biased\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the correlation coefficient of a two list with values, For matrices, the matrix correlation coefficient is calculated.
ast.target: 计算两个值列表的相关系数。对于矩阵，计算矩阵相关系数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the inverse cosine of a value in radians.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反余弦（弧度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the hyperbolic arccos of a value, defined as `acosh(x) = ln(sqrt(x^2 - 1) + x)`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反双曲余弦，定义为 `acosh(x) = ln(sqrt(x^2 - 1) + x)`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the inverse cotangent of a value.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the inverse hyperbolic tangent of a value, defined as `acoth(x) = (ln((x+1)/x) + ln(x/(x-1))) / 2`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反双曲正切，定义为 `acoth(x) = (ln((x+1)/x) + ln(x/(x-1))) / 2`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the inverse hyperbolic cosecant of a value, defined as `acsch(x) = ln(1/x + sqrt(1/x^2 + 1))`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反双曲余割，定义为 `acsch(x) = ln(1/x + sqrt(1/x^2 + 1))`。

ast.source: Calculate the inverse secant of a value.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the inverse sine of a value in radians.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反正弦（弧度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the hyperbolic arcsine of a value, defined as `asinh(x) = ln(x + sqrt(x^2 + 1))`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反双曲正弦，定义为 `asinh(x) = ln(x + sqrt(x^2 + 1))`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the inverse tangent of a value in radians.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反正切（弧度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Computes the principal value of the arc tangent of y/x in radians.
ast.target: 计算 y/x 的反正切的主值（弧度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the hyperbolic arctangent of a value, defined as `atanh(x) = ln((1 + x)/(1 - x)) / 2`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的反双曲正切，定义为 `atanh(x) = ln((1 + x)/(1 - x)) / 2`。

ast.target: 计算 x 的余切（弧度）。定义为 1/tan(x)

ast.target: 计算 x 的双曲余切（弧度）。

ast.target: 计算 x 的余割（弧度）。定义为 1/sin(x)

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the hyperbolic cosecant of x in radians. Defined as 1/sinh(x)
ast.target: 计算 x 的双曲余割（弧度）。定义为 1/sinh(x)

ast.name: description

ast.target: 计算 x 的正割（弧度）。定义为 1/cos(x)
